name: GOLFTEC Rancho Bernardo
address: 16779 Bernardo Center Dr, San Diego, CA 92128
about: GOLFTEC Rancho Bernardo is a high-tech golf training facility specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. The venue utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture systems, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and game improvement strategies. It offers private and semi-private lessons, custom club fittings, and practice memberships, with a primary focus on structured coaching programs and player development rather than casual play or social events. The facility is designed for golfers seeking a systematic approach to improvement with professional oversight and measurable results.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise feedback
Personalized improvement plans created by certified PGA coaches
Advanced technology helps players identify and correct specific swing flaws
Club fitting services provide a data-driven approach to equipment optimization

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food or kitchen facilities mentioned.
No bar or alcohol service mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for instruction and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs during lessons and practice sessions. Club rentals are also available, and custom club fitting services are offered to find the perfect equipment for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drinks are permitted as the facility does not have dining facilities and focuses on the golf training experience.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC specializes in instruction and practice rather than full course simulation. A typical private lesson lasts 60 minutes, and practice sessions are typically booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Junior golf programs and lessons for youth are available with certified instructors who use the same technology and teaching methods adapted for younger players.
